title: The Dadra and Nagar Haveli Act, 1961
full_text: The Dadra and Nagar Haveli Act, 1961 दादरा और नागर हवेली अधिनियम, 1961 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196135 Act Number: 35 Enactment Date: 1961-09-02 Act Year: 1961 Short Title: The Dadra and Nagar Haveli Act, 1961 Hindi Title: दादरा और नागर हवेली अधिनियम, 1961 Long Title: An Act to make provision for the representation of the Union territory of Dadra and Nagar Haveli in Parliament and for the administration of that Union territory and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 11-08-1961 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Dadra and Nagar Haveli Act, 1961 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Representation in the House of the People. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Varishta Panchayat. Section 5. Other functionaries. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Property and assets. Section 7. Rights and obligations. Section 8. Continuance of existing laws. Section 9. Continuance of existing taxes. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Power to extend enactments to Dadra and Nagar Haveli. Show Related Subordinates Section 11. Extension of the jurisdiction of Bombay High Court to Dadra and Nagar Haveli. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Powers of courts and other authorities for purposes of facilitating the application of laws. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Power to remove difficulties. Section 14. Power to make rules.
